description: 5-dimension initiative scoring rubric for OKR-linked initiative prioritization

dimensions.name: Revenue Impact
dimensions.description: Estimated ARR contribution, weighted by time-to-impact

scoring_guide.0-4: No measurable revenue impact or speculative at best
scoring_guide.5-9: Indirect revenue impact through efficiency or enablement
scoring_guide.10-14: Direct impact on $100K-$500K ARR within 2-4 quarters
scoring_guide.15-17: Direct impact on $500K-$2M ARR within 1-2 quarters
scoring_guide.18-20: Direct impact on >$2M ARR within current quarter

seed.rationale: Small ARR moves are proportionally larger

scale.rationale: Margin and NRR are primary levers

funnel_leverage.description: Rewards initiatives that improve a constrained funnel stage with strong downstream revenue leverage.

dimensions.name: Effort / Cost (Inverted)
dimensions.description: Person-weeks, technical complexity, dependency count. Lower effort = higher score

scoring_guide.0-4: >20 person-weeks, multiple team dependencies, new infrastructure required
scoring_guide.18-20: <1 person-week, no dependencies, configuration change only

seed.rationale: Small teams must be ruthlessly efficient

scale.rationale: Effort is less constraining at scale

dimensions.name: Strategic Alignment
dimensions.description: Match to active Objectives, board priorities, PLG/SLG motion fit

scoring_guide.0-4: No clear link to any active objective or company priority
scoring_guide.5-9: Tangentially related to a secondary objective
scoring_guide.15-17: Directly supports a primary objective and aligns with board priorities
scoring_guide.18-20: Critical enabler for the #1 company priority, multi-objective impact

dimensions.name: Timing Sensitivity
dimensions.description: Market window, competitive pressure (Gong signals), seasonality, contract cycles

scoring_guide.0-4: No time pressure, can be done any quarter
scoring_guide.5-9: Mild seasonal benefit if done soon
scoring_guide.10-14: Clear benefit to doing this quarter vs next
scoring_guide.15-17: Competitive threat or market window closing within 1-2 quarters
scoring_guide.18-20: Urgent: customer churn risk, competitive loss pattern, or regulatory deadline

gong_signal_integration.description: Optional weighting model for urgency signals from Gong or similar conversation intelligence systems.

seed.rationale: Less market pressure at small scale

dimensions.name: Confidence / Data Quality
dimensions.description: Strength of evidence: live baseline data, historical analog, benchmark coverage

scoring_guide.5-9: Industry benchmarks only, no org-specific data
scoring_guide.10-14: Org-specific data for 1-2 metrics, some benchmarks
scoring_guide.15-17: Strong org data + benchmarks + historical analog from similar initiatives
scoring_guide.18-20: Full live baseline with query evidence, proven pattern from prior cycle, high benchmark coverage

series-b.rationale: Should have reasonable data by now

must_do.label: Must-Do: Top quartile, recommend for OKR inclusion

should_do.label: Should-Do: Strong candidates, include if capacity allows

nice_to_have.label: Nice-to-Have: Low priority, park for future cycles
